<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front (row 02 column C) is lava (`L`), which is deadly. I cannot move forward. To avoid lava and reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to change direction. I will turn clockwise to face down (`v`) and then move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is floor (`.`), safe to move. I will move forward to get closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 04 column B) is floor (`.`), safe to move. However, the goal is at row 04 column D, which is two cells to the right of my current row. To reach the goal, I need to change direction to facing right (`>`). To turn from down to right, I will rotate counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front (row 03 column C) is floor (`.`), safe to move. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 04 column D, so I will move forward.

FRENTE

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column C facing right (`>`). The cell in front (row 03 column D) is floor (`.`), safe to move. Moving forward will place me right below the goal at row 04 column D. I will move forward.
</thought>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column D facing right (`>`). The cell in front (row 03 column E) is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D (down from my position). I need to turn downward. To face down from right (`>`), I should rotate 90 degrees clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
